message:
feat(layout): add structured tracing for pipeline decisions (bd-gy4.5)

Add tracing crate to fm-layout and instrument key decision points:

- layout.dispatch (info): requested/selected algorithm, reason,
  capability_unavailable, diagram_type, node/edge counts
- layout.guardrail.fallback (warn): initial→selected algorithm
  transition, estimated time, reason
- layout.guardrail.ok (debug): algorithm within budget
- layout.cycle_removal (info): strategy, cycle/node counts,
  max cycle size, reversed edge count
- layout.cycle_removal.acyclic (trace): no cycles detected
- layout.crossing_minimization (debug): crossings after
  barycenter, rank count

Log level conventions:
  info  = pipeline decisions visible to operators
  warn  = fallback/degradation events
  debug = internal algorithm metrics
  trace = no-op fast paths

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -7,6 +7,7 @@ rust-version.workspace = true
 
 [dependencies]
 fm-core.workspace = true
+tracing.workspace = true
 
 [dev-dependencies]
 proptest = "1.6.0"
